page_content:
Corequisite: TLPL332, TLPL362, TLPL342, and TLPL479G.

Restriction: Must be in Elementary Education program; and minimum cumulative GPA of 2.75; Or permission of EDUC-Teaching and Learning, Policy and Leadership department.

TLPL362 Curriculum and Instruction in Elementary Education: Social Studies (3 Credits)

Curriculum, organization and methods of teaching, evaluation of materials, and utilization of environmental resources. Emphasis on multicultural education. Includes laboratory/field experiences. Corequisite: EDCI362, TLPL361, EDCI489, and TLPL306.

Restriction: Must be in Elementary Education program; and minimum cumulative GPA of 2.75; Or permission of EDUC-Teaching and Learning, Policy and Leadership department.

Credit Only Granted for. EDCI322 or TLPL362.
